name: ai-auto-fix
description: Managed by the PR manager to attempt a validated auto-fix on trusted PRs.

name: ai-fix-applied
description: Grok auto-fix already pushed a commit to this PR.

name: ai-autopilot
description: Managed by the PR manager to allow bounded CI repair on trusted PRs.

name: has-patch
description: Grok produced a high-confidence patch candidate for this PR.

name: needs-review
description: Human review is needed because automation found higher-risk issues.

name: security-issue
description: Security or privacy issue requires immediate attention.

name: automation
description: Workflow, bot, CI/CD, or repository automation change.

name: docs-only
description: Only docs and repo text changed.

name: blocked-ci
description: PR is waiting on failed or pending CI, status checks, or automation self-tests.

name: blocked-review
description: PR is waiting on current human review, approval, or unresolved review threads.

name: blocked-author
description: PR needs author action before it can reach final review.

name: merge-ready
description: PR is ready for final human review and manual merge.

name: stale-review
description: Prior approvals are stale on an older head commit.

name: do-not-merge
description: Explicitly block PR automation and manual merge.

name: work-in-progress
description: PR is not ready for automation handoff or final review.
